description: Piotr from Halborn discusses lessons learned from auditing Solana programs, highlighting vulnerabilities and their impacts on users and protocols. He emphasizes the importance of security measures and the prevalence of issues like loss of funds and insufficient input sanitization.
topic_summary: The presentation covers key findings from Solana program audits, focusing on vulnerabilities, user impacts, and root causes of security issues [t=4:56 - 16:00].
